concerns.text: FR‑003 (compute additional invariants: arc index, Seifert circle count, bridge number) is not referenced anywhere in the plan. The plan neither mentions implementation nor defers this requirement with a [deferred] marker.
FR‑006 (compute correlation coefficients and effect‑size measures) is absent from the plan; no module or step addresses correlation analysis.
FR‑012 (filter dataset to hyperbolic knots with volume > 0) is not covered in the plan; no filtering step or script is listed.
FR‑013 (hyperbolic‑volume cross‑check against KnotInfo) is missing; the plan does not include any validation against an external reference.
FR‑014 is referenced in the plan (precision.py) but FR‑014 does not exist in the specification. This is an over‑reach of the spec.
FR‑015 (precision validation threshold for braid index) appears in the research document but is not defined in the spec and is not addressed in the plan.
SC‑001 (dataset completeness and validation benchmarking) is not mentioned or linked to any artifact in the plan.
SC‑005 (≥ 95 % of computable invariants populated – Phase 2+) is absent; the plan provides no metric or checkpoint for this success criterion.
SC‑006 (handling of ambiguous or missing alternating classification) is not addressed; no flagging or exclusion rule is described.
SC‑007 (documentation and validation of tie‑breaking rules) is not reflected; the plan mentions tie‑breaking in code but does not specify a reproducibility document or validation script.
SC‑008 (core invariants tabulated from Knot Atlas with coverage reporting) is not covered; no artifact records coverage statistics.
SC‑009 (descriptive comparison metrics: mean difference, variance ratio, Cohen’s d) is missing; no analysis step is listed.
SC‑010 (Phase 2+ algorithm validation against KnotInfo for additional invariants) is not present; the plan does not include any validation step for arc index, Seifert circle count, or bridge number.
SC‑012 (hyperbolic‑volume data completeness and excluded‑knots documentation) is not addressed; no documentation of excluded torus/satellite knots is listed.
SC‑013 (data‑quality metrics: null % ≤ 5, format pass ≥ 99, duplicate = 0) is not referenced; the plan does not specify where these metrics will be measured or reported.
SC‑014 (hyperbolic‑volume consistency cross‑check against KnotInfo with ≥ 90 % match) is missing; no cross‑check step is defined.
The plan includes FR‑014 (precision thresholds for core invariants) which is not defined in the specification, constituting an over‑reach.
